_comment: IMP-179: versioned default framework policy. A deterministic PreToolUse command hook denies hand Write/Edit of governed Ignite Sentinel artifacts (project-brief.md, 03_specs/*.md, 04_backlog/*.md); regenerate them through their owning command (/brief, /specs, /backlog). This is tier 1 (works in any Claude Code version). The deep, opt-in ignite-verifier (tier 3, PostToolUse) is enabled separately via .claude/settings.local.json — see .claude/hooks/README.md. The BA who needs a deliberate bypass has the CLI.
